case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. CAROL SALES et al

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALES, CAROL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 345 ARGUELLO BLVD., #507, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
